description_long: This is a medium-sized wooden barrel with a classic cylindrical shape, slightly bulging at the center and tapering towards the top and bottom. The body is constructed from vertical wooden staves, each showing a natural wood grain texture and subtle wear, giving it a rustic appearance. Two wide, black metal hoops encircle the barrel, one near the top and one near the bottom, each studded with evenly spaced rivets for reinforcement. On one side, a prominent round metal plug or bung is visible, likely used for filling or emptying the contents. The top surface appears to be sealed, with a faint decorative marking or stamp visible in the center. The overall finish is matte with some gloss on the metal bands, suggesting durability and suitability for outdoor or urban environments.
description: A rustic wooden barrel reinforced with black metal hoops and a visible metal plug, featuring a sealed top with a faint marking.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wooden staves, two black metal hoops, and a partial view of the metal plug on the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the continuous metal hoops and the wood grain, with no plug visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the metal plug now on the right, showing the same banding and wood texture.
description_view_3: Rear view featuring the metal plug or bung centered between the hoops, with the wood and metal details clearly visible.
